aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa1.text: Signalgraph publishes nothing it cannot trace to a source.

aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa2.text: Claims carry verbatim quote spans, trust tiers, and freshness classes; the writer cites only those claims.
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa2.quote: every chunk and claim traces to a URL, carries a trust tier and a freshness class, and is timestamped

aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa3.text: A draft faces seven checks; failing days are skipped, not padded.
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa3.quote: Gate failure => one regeneration => skip the day. Never lower a threshold to ship.

aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa4.text: The entailment judge is decorrelated from the writer so a model never grades its own prose.
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa4.quote: Judge decorrelated from writer: different provider preferred; at minimum a different model family

aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa5.text: Branch protection makes the curator's merge the sole road to production.
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa5.quote: Nothing publishes without a curator-merged PR on the site repo.
